name: apsal-studio
description: Build live-action AI photography through fully populated Chinese or English proposal cards, package every Prompt, and generate each shot directly with Codex—no image API key required.

interface.shortDescription: Complete photography proposals in every card
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio follows the current Chinese or English Codex conversation, turning one natural-language idea into five highlighted text-card layers covering all thirteen protocol roles. Every card is filled with a recommendation, rationale, adjustable directions, values, observable results, locks and acceptance criteria. The default female protagonist is poised and versatile across makeup and wardrobe while identity remains locked. Studio can also take over legacy APSAL runs, export bilingual Prompt/Skill packages and hand independent shots to Codex built-in image generation without an image API key.
defaultPrompt: 创建九张真人摄影主题，确认十三元素并打包全部 Prompt。
Create a nine-image live-action photography theme, confirm all thirteen elements, and package every Prompt.
Open this legacy APSAL ZIP, recover its references, and generate the first image directly with Codex.
